items.name: Starla Moore / The Handmade Alphas
items.notes: Perfect fit - highly technical Etsy seller educator. 100K-116K subs. Works closely with eRank. Follow-up sent day 4.

items.name: Dylan Jahraus
items.notes: Built $10M without ads. 116K subs, 5,700+ students, podcast with 1M downloads. Follow-up sent day 4.

items.name: Gold City Ventures (Julie Berninger & Cody Berman)
items.notes: Built $1M+ teaching printables. 50-70K subs, 68K email list. Students earned $3.3M+. Follow-up references their sizing guide. Day 4.

items.name: Kara Buntin / Artisan Shopper
items.notes: 30-40K subs. 25+ years experience, 50K+ Etsy sales. Published author. CONTACT FORM ONLY — send manually via artisanshopper.com

items.name: Nancy Badillo
items.notes: 40-50K subs. 1,200+ videos. 13 years digital marketing. Follow-up references her file types blog post. Day 4.

items.name: Cassie Smallwood
items.notes: 20-30K subs. Former preschool teacher. Cross-platform marketing (YouTube + Etsy). Email draft: emails/21-cassie-smallwood.md

items.name: Renae Christine
items.notes: 40-60K subs. 2.5M+ views, six-figure stationery business. #1 Amazon bestseller. Email draft: emails/22-renae-christine.md

items.name: Mei Pak
items.notes: 40K subs. CreativeLive instructor. CONTACT FORM ONLY — send manually via mei-pak.com

items.name: RJ Martinez
items.notes: 50-70K subs. Strong POD focus. CONTACT FORM ONLY — try Instagram DM @rjhustles or Gumroad message

items.name: Paul Xavier / Next Level Creators
items.notes: 125K subs. Not Etsy-specific — lower priority. CONTACT FORM ONLY.

items.name: Pam Duthie / Etsy Nerd
items.notes: 15-25K subs. Niche (needle-felt), lower priority for printables. CONTACT FORM ONLY.

items.name: Sadie Smiley / Passive Income Pathways
items.notes: 30-40K subs. Veteran blogger since 1999. CONTACT FORM ONLY — send manually via passiveincomepathways.com

items.name: T / hey.itsteaa
items.notes: 300K+ TikTok. $500K+ in 2 years. NO EMAIL FOUND — must DM on Instagram. High priority if you can reach.

items.name: pixelsbyteaa
items.notes: 50-80K TikTok. AI art + digital products. NO EMAIL FOUND — try TikTok DM or bio link.

items.name: Gold City Ventures (TikTok)
items.notes: Same team as #3. Already contacted via YouTube email. No separate action needed.

items.name: Chelsea Shelton / Gold City Ventures Student
items.notes: GCV student, 11K+ Etsy sales. Reach through GCV team or CONTACT FORM ONLY.

items.name: Rachel Jones / Side Hustle Nation Featured
items.notes: $10K+/month Etsy seller. No direct contact found — try via Side Hustle Nation.

items.name: Courtney (Gold City Ventures Student)
items.notes: Former TV personality, mom of 4, 12K+ sales. Reach through GCV team.

items.name: Caitlin Bacher / Little Farm Media
items.notes: 10-20K subs. Social media strategist. CONTACT FORM ONLY.

items.name: Giggles Galore (Mariah Leeson)
items.notes: 15-25K subs. Blogger since 2009, Etsy shop gigglesgalorenmore. Email draft: emails/23-giggles-galore.md
